mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attempts (user_id, question_id, level_id, answer, is_correct, time_spent, attempt_no, source) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{levelId}, #{answer}, #{isCorrect}, #{timeSpent}, #{attemptNo}, #{source})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM attempts WHERE user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM attempts WHERE user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{n}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attempts WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND is_correct=1 AND created_at >= #{since}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attempts WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND created_at >= #{since}
SELECT DISTINCT question_id FROM attempts WHERE user_id=#{userId}
SELECT AVG(a.time_spent) FROM attempts a JOIN users u ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE u.grade_id=#{gradeId} AND a.level_id=#{levelId} AND a.time_spent IS NOT NULL AND a.time_spent > 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT question_id) FROM attempts WHERE user_id=#{userId}
